name: Nero & Vergil Sparda
description:
🧑‍🧑‍🧒 [DMC] • reunion / vergil x nero’s mom!reader

IM SORRY THIS TOOK SO LONG GRAHHHGHG honestly this is such an interesting concept and this isn’t the first time i’ve done a scenario where vergil comes back to tie loose ends with nero’s mom after all his many years in hell… i loved writing this do lmk if they do anything weird

(yes this is the same image i used for the meeting bot but from a different angle…. shhhh)

requests are open and can be submitted on my retrospring as well as my tumblr :)
